pi_items.source: Task description and verifier.py logic explicitly require this case name.
Task description explicitly requires this case number.
setup_task.sh generates the wiped image at this exact path.
Task description and verifier.py explicit checks for this path.
Task description specifies this path for the recovery report.
Task description explicitly requests this output path.
verifier.py uses this path to retrieve the export results.
setup_task.sh injects exactly 2048 blocks of 512-byte zeros before appending the NTFS image, establishing a true offset of 2048 sectors.

privileged_info_summary: Verified that the disk image data is a real-world forensic sample sourced from the Digital Forensic Tool Testing (DFTT) project (#7 NTFS Undelete test image). The 'wiped_drive.raw' is generated by prepending exactly 2048 blocks of 512 bytes (zeros) to the downloaded NTFS partition image, establishing a true offset of 2048 sectors. The expected Autopsy case details, volume recovery path, and output reports explicitly match the task description and verifier constraints.
